list.vod_blurb: Chief Inspector Jules Maigret, the invention of former crime reporter turned prolific author Georges
list.vod_content: Chief Inspector Jules Maigret, the invention of former crime reporter turned prolific author Georges Simenon, inhabits a vividly realized Paris not often seen on camera that takes us from the glitzy upper-class world of luxury hotels and mansions to local

list.vod_blurb: The plot revolves around Richard Bean (Kline), a Broadway star known for his egotism, who expe
list.vod_content: The plot revolves around Richard Bean (Kline), a Broadway star known for his egotism, who experiences a public breakdown and retreats to his hometown. After returning to the family-run theater where he first discovered his talent, he finds his father, the former artistic director, suffering from dementia. The theater, now reduced to a dinner theater serving murder mysteries, is run by his brother (Tenney) and sister-in-law, who is also the townâ€™s mayor. Determined to restore the theaterâ€™s former glory, Richard plans to stage a great American classic, with himself as director and star, in an effort to save both the theater and the town.
